currencies.infoImpact: Updating a rate affects future entries only - past transaction history is not recalculated.
currencies.infoAudit: Each modification is tracked in the audit log.
currencies.simulatorDesc: Test an amount with current rates.
currencies.validation.tooHigh: Rate seems too high. Check the value.
